title: Gunfire Overhaul: Echoes of the Battlefield
description: Gunfire Overhaul: Echoes of the Battlefield - an add-on for many weapon mods that adds realistic distant gunfire and artillery sounds, creating echo effects and a deeply immersive battlefield atmosphere.
body:
MOD IN ALPHA TEST

 

Disclaimer

 

The Gunfire Overhaul mod contains intense gunshot sound effects that can be quite loud and realistic. These sounds may startle or cause panic in some users and may be unpleasant for sensitive hearing. Please use the mod with caution, especially in environments where loud noises could cause discomfort or unwanted reactions.

 

Gunfire Overhaul: Echoes of the Battlefield - is an add-on for many weapon mods that adds realistic distant gunfire sounds, creating echo effects and a deeply immersive battlefield atmosphere.

This mod and add-on at the same time completely rethinks the sounds of gunshots in Minecraft. As a standalone mod, it fills the world with ambient battle sounds. As an add-on, it integrates with popular weapon mods, replacing standard gunshot sounds with dynamic and realistic ones that change depending on distance, caliber, and environment. Experience the true power and echoes of war like never before!

 

This mod completely rethinks the sounds of gunshots in Minecraft, making them incredibly realistic and dynamic. Enjoy unique gunshot sounds that change depending on the distance, caliber, and environment, as well as background battle sounds that create the atmosphere of a real battlefield. Experience the true power of firearms like never before!

 

REQUIRES: Cloth Config API

 

Functionality as of 0.0.6 alpha:

 

Dynamic Sound

 

  • Sound depends on distance: From a loud shot up close to a distant, muffled echo up to 3 kilometers away!
  • Caliber matters! A pistol shot and a sniper rifle shot will sound completely different, with unique sounds for each type.
  • Realistic speed of sound: Sound travels at a realistic speed, so you will first see the flash, and only then will the sound wave reach you.

 

Battlefield Atmosphere

 

  • Ambient gunshots: The mod generates random gunshot sounds around the player, creating the feeling that a battle is happening somewhere nearby.
  • Various scenarios: You will hear everything: from single shots to short bursts and sustained automatic fire.
  • Different weapon types: The system simulates shots of varying power, from pistols to heavy machine guns, depending on the settings.

 

Mod Compatibility Status

 

Gunfire Overhaul is being developed to be compatible with weapon mods. Here is the current list of supported mods:

✅ TaCZ + Gunpowder RevolutionGreat War gunpack: hamster:long_ammo, hamster:medium_ammo, hamster:compact_ammo (tested version 1.1.6-hotfix)

✅ SuperB Warfare (tested version 0.8.8-hotfix)

✅ Create: Big Cannons (tested version 5.9.1)

 

This list will be updated. If you notice that shots from a particular mod are not using the Gunfire Overhaul effects, or if some rifles/guns have no sound, please let us know!

 

Frequent Game Crash Causes

 

If you are experiencing crashes or problems with launching the game, please check the following:

 

  • Incorrect Forge Version. Make sure you are using the recommended version of Forge for your version of Minecraft (47.4.0). Other versions may be incompatible.
  • Incompatibility with Other Mods. If you are adding other mods, check them for compatibility. Some mods can conflict with each other, leading to crashes. Try running the game without additional mods to identify the source of the problem.
